    BaseCtl<F extends BaseForm,​T extends BaseDTO,​S extends BaseServiceInt<T>>
    Base Controller class for handling common CRUD operations.
    BaseDAOImpl<T extends BaseDTO>
    BaseDAOImpl is a generic DAO implementation that provides common database operations using JPA EntityManager.
    BaseDAOInt<T extends BaseDTO>
    BaseDAOInt is a generic DAO interface.
    BaseDTO
    BaseDTO is the parent class for all DTO classes.
    BaseForm
    BaseForm is the parent form class for all form classes.
    BaseServiceImpl<T extends BaseDTO,​D extends BaseDAOInt<T>>
    BaseServiceImpl is a generic service implementation class.
    BaseServiceInt<T extends BaseDTO>
    BaseServiceInt is a generic service interface.
